pr.title: Record: Coprime-Stride Loader + Full GPTQ + XSA-all — val_bpb 1.1136 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Leveraged coprime-stride loader, full Hessian GPTQ with XSA on all layers, and trimmed GPTQ reserve (plus FA3/FA2 fallback) to reclaim extra steps.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Standard training regime with validation used only for final evaluation.
techniques: Full Hessian GPTQ + XSA on every layer
Reduced GPTQ reserve and FA3/FA2 fallback
